DP.445.0001:
Do unto others as they do unto
you... Yup, it’s Payback!\f
It’s good for Pokémon battles,
but if you do that in real life...\f
There’ll be no end to the fighting,
that’s for sure.\f
DP.445.0002:
Use it after the foe, and its power
gets doubled!
DP.445.0003:
Jogging is good for you, but you have
to make sure you’re not overdoing it!
DP.445.0004:
I slow down and stop at times, sure.
I’m only human, after all.
DP.445.0007:
Trainer Tips\f
Pokémon attacks are classified as
being either physical or special.\f
A physical attack is based on the
Attack stat of the Pokémon.\f
Likewise, a special attack is based
on the Special Attack stat.
